terms: {'climate risk': '氣候風險', 'hkma': '金管局'}
src_raw: Climate change is one of the major risks threatening the well-being of mankind and the sustainability of the world economy. The financial sector in which banks operate, being an integral part of the society, will also be impacted and hence should be more proactive in managing climate risks. The HKMA is committed to exploring ways to address this challenge. Against this background, the HKMA unveiled in May a number of measures for promoting the development of green finance in Hong Kong, including the adoption of a three-phased approach to promote green and sustainable banking.
mt_raw: 氣候變化是威脅人類福祉和全球經濟可持續發展的主要風險之一。銀行所處的金融行業作為社會不可或缺的一部分，也會受到影響，因此應該更積極地管理氣候風險。香港金融管理局致力探索應對這一挑戰的方法。在此背景下，香港金融管理局於五月推出多項措施，推動香港綠色金融發展，包括採用三階段推廣綠色與可持續銀行業的策略。

src_raw: The HKMA sees RI as an investment approach that takes into account the impact of various environmental, social and governance (ESG) factors on long-term investment returns and their sustainability. The HKMA believes that, by putting an appropriate emphasis on RI and sustainable long-term economic performance, it can better achieve the investment objectives of the Exchange Fund and reduce risks associated with the ESG-related matters of its underlying investments.
mt_raw: 香港金融管理局將RI視為一種考慮各類環境、社會和治理（ESG）因素對長期投資回報及其可持續性影響的投資方法。香港金融管理局相信，通過適當強調RI和可持續長期經濟表現，可以更好地實現前海基金的投資目標，並減少與其基礎投資相關的ESG風險。

terms: {'esg factor': 'ESG因素', 'hkma': '金管局', 'manager': '經理', 'bond investment': '債券', 'external manager': '外聘投資經理', 'general partner': '專責合夥人', 'investment analysis process': '投資分析程序', 'private market investment': '私募市場投資', 'public market investment': '公開市場投資', 'esg': '環境、社會及管治'}
src_raw: The HKMA incorporates ESG factors into its investment analysis processes to identify risks and opportunities, as it believes that these factors can materially affect the long-term value of its investments. Specifically, the HKMA has been integrating ESG factors into its investment process for both public and private market investments. For public market investments, the HKMA incorporates ESG factors in its credit risk analysis of bond investment. External managers that share the HKMA’s RI beliefs are selected and appointed. The HKMA communicates its RI beliefs to all its external managers and expects them to align in such a way that the overall sustainable long-term economic performance target is attainable. For private market investments, the ESG policies and practices of the HKMA’s general partners are examined as part of its due diligence process.
mt_raw: 香港金融管理局將ESG因素融入投資分析流程中，以識別風險和機會，因為它相信這些因素會實質性影響長期投資價值。具體來說，香港金融管理局已將ESG因素融入其公共市場和私人市場投資過程中。對於公開市場投資，香港金融管理局將ESG因素納入債券投資的信用風險分析中。與香港金融管理局的RI理念一致的外部經理人將被遴選與委任。香港金融管理局將其RI理念傳達給所有外部經理人，並期望其達成一致，以實現整體可持續長期經濟績效的目標。對於私人市場投資，則在盡職審查過程中審查香港金融管理局普通合夥人的ESG政策和實踐。

src_raw: The HKMA promotes financial literacy through various channels. Apart from running educational programmes to promote smart and responsible use of banking and financial services by the public, the HKMA features on its revamped official website a new dedicated section on “Smart Consumers”, where the public can find useful information and smart tips on a wide range of banking and related products and services. Social media platforms such as Facebook, LinkedIn, YouTube, Instagram and Twitter are used in addition to the HKMA official website and publications to provide up-to-date information on banking and financial affairs.
mt_raw: 香港金融管理局通過多渠道推廣金融知識。除了舉辦教育項目以促進公眾智能和負責任地使用銀行和金融服務外，香港金融管理局在其更新的官方網站上設有新專區“智能消費者”，供公眾查閱有關各類銀行及相關產品和服務的實用信息和智慧提示。除官方網站和刊物外，亦利用Facebook、LinkedIn、YouTube、Instagram 和 Twitter等社交媒體平台，提供有關銀行和金融事務的最新資訊。

src_raw: The HKMA Information Centre, serving as the HKMA’s major public education and research resource since 2003, introduces the work of the HKMA to the community and promotes public awareness of monetary and banking matters. Educational guided tours are offered daily for group visitors from schools and non-profit making organisations. public education seminars and other activities are also organised for students to enhance their financial knowledge and literacy. In addition, the HKMA works closely with the Investor and Financial Education Council to promote financial literacy in Hong Kong via its financial education platform, The Chin Family.
mt_raw: 香港金融管理局資訊中心，自2003年起成為其主要的公共教育和研究資源，向社區介紹香港金融管理局的工作，提升公眾對貨幣和銀行事務的認識。每天為來自學校和非營利組織的團體遊客提供教育導覽。亦舉辦針對學生的公眾教育研討會及其他活動，以提升他們的金融知識和素養。此外，香港金融管理局與投資者及財務教育委員會緊密合作，通過其金融教育平台“名人之家”，推廣金融素養。

terms: {'apple app store': 'Apple App Store', 'braille': '點字', 'google play store': 'Google Play Store', 'hkma': '金管局', 'hong kong society for the blind': '香港盲人輔導會', 'note - issue bank': '發鈔銀行', 'note - measure template': '量鈔器'}
src_raw: To help the visually impaired differentiate between the denomination of the banknotes, a mobile app, sponsored by the HKMA and developed by the Hong Kong Society for the Blind, uses the phone’s camera to scan the banknote patterns for the denomination. The app is available for download from Apple App Store and Google play Store for free. A note-measuring template sponsored by the HKMA and the three note-issuing banks has also been introduced to measure the length of the note. It can measure both the 2018 Series and the notes currently in circulation. The template is embossed with Braille on one side and symbols on the other. It is freely distributed at voluntary agencies serving the visually impaired community.
mt_raw: 為幫助視障人士辨別鈔票面額，由香港金融管理局贊助並由香港盲人協會開發的手機應用程式，利用手機攝像頭掃描鈔票上的圖案來識別面額。該應用可從Apple App Store和Google Play Store免費下載。此外，由香港金融管理局與三家鈔票發行銀行協助提供的鈔票尺寸測量模板，也用來測量鈔票長度。該模板適用於2018年系列和目前流通的鈔票，單面壓有盲文，另一面有符號，可在服務視障社群的志願組織免費領取。

src_raw: My objectives are to obtain reasonable assurance about whether the financial statements as a whole are free from material misstatement, whether due to fraud or error, and to issue an auditor’s report that includes my opinion. Reasonable assurance is a high level of assurance, but is not a guarantee that an audit conducted in accordance with the Audit Commission auditing standards will always detect a material misstatement when it exists. Misstatements can arise from fraud or error and are considered material if, individually or in the aggregate, they could reasonably be expected to influence the economic decisions of users taken on the basis of these financial statements.
mt_raw: 我的目標是獲取合理保證，確定財務報表整體是否不存在由於舞弊或錯誤而導致的重大錯誤，我會發出一份含有我意見的審計報告。合理保證屬高水準，但並不保證依照審計署審計標準進行的審計一定能在所有情況下發現所有重大錯誤。錯誤可能由舞弊或錯誤引起，若其單獨或合計對用戶基於該等財務報表作出經濟決策產生重大影響，則為重大錯誤。

src_raw: From the matters communicated with the Audit Sub-Committee of the Exchange Fund Advisory Committee, I determine those matters that were of most significance in the audit of the financial statements of the current period and are therefore the key audit matters. I describe these matters in my auditor’s report unless law or regulation precludes public disclosure about the matter or when, in extremely rare circumstances, I determine that a matter should not be communicated in my report because the adverse consequences of doing so would reasonably be expected to outweigh the public interest benefits of such communication.
mt_raw: 根據我與審計分委員會溝通的事項，我確定本期財務報表審計的最重要事項，即關鍵審計事項。除非法律或規例阻止公開披露，否則我會在審計師報告中描述這些事項；在極少數特殊情況下，如果我認為披露該事項會帶來不利後果，該不利性大於公開披露的公眾利益，則可能決定不披露。
